name: baryon-mcp
description: Read Proton Mail and save drafts through your local Proton Mail Bridge.
long_description: Baryon exposes your Proton Mail mailbox to MCP clients as seven tools: list folders, list/search emails, read a message, list and fetch attachments, and create or replace drafts. It talks IMAP to the Proton Mail Bridge running on your machine over loopback only, authenticates Bridge by pinning its TLS certificate, and keeps draft saving as its only mailbox write capability — it cannot send, move, or generally delete messages or change flags. To attach files, save_draft can read paths on your machine, optionally restricted to a folder you choose.

bridge_username.title: Bridge IMAP username
bridge_username.description: Shown in Proton Mail Bridge under your account's mailbox configuration (usually your Proton address).

bridge_password.title: Bridge password
bridge_password.description: The password Bridge generated for IMAP clients — not your Proton account password. Stored in the OS keychain.

bridge_host.title: Bridge host
bridge_host.description: Loopback address Bridge listens on. Only loopback addresses are accepted.

bridge_imap_security.title: IMAP connection mode
bridge_imap_security.description: "starttls" for Bridge's default STARTTLS mode, or "tls" if you switched Bridge's IMAP connection mode to SSL.

bridge_tls_cert.title: Bridge TLS certificate
bridge_tls_cert.description: Bridge's certificate for a verified connection: in Bridge go to Settings → Advanced settings → Export TLS certificates, then pick the exported cert.pem here. Without it the server refuses to start unless insecure mode is enabled below.

bridge_allow_insecure.title: Allow unverified connection
bridge_allow_insecure.description: Connect without verifying Bridge's TLS certificate. Only enable if you understand that another local process could impersonate Bridge and capture the Bridge password.

attachment_root.title: Attachment folder restriction
attachment_root.description: When set, save_draft may only attach files from inside this folder. Leave empty to allow any file your user account can read.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all folders in the mailbox

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List messages in a folder, newest first, with pagination

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search messages by text, sender, recipient, subject, date range, or unread state

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Read one message's metadata, text bodies, and attachment list

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.description: List a message's attachments without transferring content

tools.name: get_attachment
tools.description: Fetch one attachment (up to 25 MB decoded)

tools.name: save_draft
tools.description: Create or replace a draft, including a threaded reply, with plain text, optional HTML, and attachments from base64 or local file paths
